title: Earthy Silky American Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A rich and indulgent American dish featuring sweet potatoes, light rum, and tandoor spices, perfect for special occasions. This Jain-friendly recipe is free from animal products and by-products.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the sweet potatoes with olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the sweet potatoes in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until they are tender.
In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
In a blender or food processor, combine the roasted sweet potatoes, onion mixture, light rum, tandoor masala, maple syrup, and coconut cream. Blend until smooth and silky.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Bake the casserole for 25-30 minutes, or until it is heated through and the top is lightly browned.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
